name: vox-protocol
description: Vox Protocol — onchain identity, proof-of-call, and reputation/escrow rails for voice AI agents on Monad testnet

scripts.deploy:monad: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url https://testnet-rpc.monad.xyz --broadcast -vvv
scripts.vercel-build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
